title: thelypteris iguapensis
intro: Thelypteris iguapensis, also known as Iguape fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris iguapensis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris iguapensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
